candidates.detail: Error response from daemon: No such image: pytorch/pytorch:2.4.1-cuda12.1-cudnn9-runtime

operator_rules: Use the emitted MIB_DOCKER_BASE_IMAGE_WITH_DIGEST only for Docker build handoffs that require a digest-pinned CUDA base image.
Do not use application images or fixture images as CUDA base images.
Do not claim M6-RC or v0 GO from base-image resolution alone.
If no candidate resolves, pull or provide a CUDA/PyTorch runtime image on the CUDA host and rerun this resolver.
